LAW AND MOTION, 302, MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE, OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY. (EMAIL 6/5/23) (D. 302)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-16-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUN-16-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT COSTAR REALTY INFORMATION, INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY THE ACTION BASED UPON FORUM NON CONVENIENS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PARTIES STIPULATED TO TRANSFER THIS ACTION TO ORANGE COUNTY. IN ADDITION, PLAINTIFF DISMISSED MOVANT ON MAY 22, 2023. LASTLY, THIS IS A LANDLORD-TENANT MATTER THAT SHOULD HAVE BEEN CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENT 501 PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay The Action Based Upon Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Jun-16-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT COSTAR REALTY INFORMATION, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss Or Stay The Action Based Upon Forum Non Conveniens.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. The parties stipulated to transfer this action to Orange County. In addition, plaintiff dismissed movant on May 22, 2023. Lastly, this is a landlord-tenant matter that should have been calendared in department 501 per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Motion To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Jun-05-2023 Off Calendar
